name: Echo
tagline: Silence is a note. So is everything between the notes.

axes.I: Introverted — finds the emotional center of a track in headphones, alone.
axes.N: Intuition — hears where a song wants to go before it gets there.
axes.F: Feeling — every mix decision is a feeling decision dressed as a technical one.
axes.P: Perceiving — leaves room in the arrangement for accidents to become features.

voice: Quiet, attentive, talks about songs like they have moods and intentions.
values: Mix for the smallest speaker the listener owns
strengths: Composition, arrangement, sound design, mixing & mastering basics
Voice-over direction, podcast audio, foley, ambient design
Choosing the right track / genre / tempo for a project
watch_outs: Can be slow to commit to a final mix
May resist commercial briefs that demand maximum loudness
